call_transcript:
Agent: Hi Eleanor, this is Mark calling from Finance Solutions. I see you recently inquired about a personal loan on our website. Um, how are you doing today? 
Eleanor: Good, thanks. 
Agent: Great! So, based on your application, we are pre-approving you for a $10,000 Personal Loan at a rate of 8.99%. This could really help with, you know, consolidating debt or maybe a home improvement project? 
Eleanor: I was thinking more about consolidating some credit card debt. 
Agent: Excellent! That's a very smart move. With this loan, you'd have one fixed monthly payment, and potentially save a significant amount on interest. The monthly payment would be around $200. Does that sound manageable? 
Eleanor: Yeah, that sounds pretty good. What are the fees like? 
Agent: There's a one-time origination fee of $150, and that's it. No prepayment penalties. We pride ourselves on transparency. 
Eleanor: Okay. And the interest rate is fixed, right? 
Agent: Absolutely. 8.99% for the life of the loan. 
Eleanor: Alright, I think I'm ready to move forward. 
Agent: Fantastic! Let's just quickly verify some information...

Agent: Hello Mr. Miller? This is Sarah calling from Finance Solutions. We're offering a special promotion on our Signature Credit Card. 
Robert: (Sighs) Where did you get my number? I've told you people before, I'm not interested. 
Agent: Sir, I apologize for the inconvenience. We believe this card could offer you valuable rewards and benefits. We are pre-approving you for a $2,500 Signature Credit Card at an interest rate of 19.99%. 
Robert: 19.99?! Are you kidding me? That's outrageous! I already have a credit card. 
Agent: Well, sir, this card offers cash back on all purchases, and a lower APR after six months of responsible use. 
Robert: Look, I don't need another credit card. And frankly, I'm getting really annoyed with these calls. Put me on your do-not-call list! 
Agent: I understand your frustration, sir. I can certainly add you to the list. Have a good day. (Click)

Agent: Hi Jessica, this is David from Finance Solutions. I'm calling regarding a referral from our partner, GreenTech Solutions. They mentioned you might be interested in a personal loan. 
Jessica: Oh, yeah, I did fill out something online. 
Agent: Perfect! So, we're pre-approving you for a $15,000 Personal Loan at a rate of 7.49%. What are you hoping to use the funds for? 
Jessica: I'm planning a wedding. It's… it's getting expensive, obviously. 
Agent: Congratulations! That's wonderful. A wedding is a big expense. Our loan can help you manage those costs without breaking the bank. We offer flexible repayment terms. 
Jessica: I've been looking at a few different options. I got a quote from First National Bank. 
Agent: Okay, and what was their rate? 
Jessica: It was… around 8.25%, I think. 
Agent: Ah, okay. Well, our rate is significantly lower, at 7.49%. Plus, we have a faster approval process and no hidden fees. We also offer a grace period on your first payment. 
Jessica: Hmm, that's good to know. What about the terms? 
Agent: We can offer terms from 24 to 60 months. Let's find a payment plan that fits your budget. 
Jessica: Okay, let's talk about the 36-month option...

Agent: Hello Michael, this is Lisa calling from Finance Solutions. I see you expressed interest in our Signature Credit Card online. 
Michael: Yeah, I was just browsing. 
Agent: Great! We are pre-approving you for a $5,000 Signature Credit Card at a rate of 14.99%. This card offers excellent rewards for travel and dining. 
Michael: I'm not really a big traveler. And I already have a card with pretty good rewards. 
Agent: I understand. But our card also offers purchase protection and extended warranties. It's a really comprehensive package. 
Michael: Hmm. It sounds okay, but I'm not sure I need another credit card right now. I'm trying to actually *reduce* my credit utilization. 
Agent: That's a very responsible approach. Perhaps this isn't the right time then. Would you like me to send you some information via email so you can review it at your convenience? 
Michael: Yeah, that would be great. 
Agent: Excellent. What's your email address?

Agent: Hello Mrs. Rodriguez? This is Sarah calling from Finance Solutions. We're offering a special… 
Patricia: (Interrupting) Oh, for goodness sake! Not again! You people called me yesterday, and the day before! Where did you even *get* my number? I told you I'm not interested! 
Agent: Ma'am, I apologize for the repeated calls. We are pre-approving you for a $3,000 Personal Loan at an interest rate of 22.99%... 
Patricia: 22.99?! That's highway robbery! I'm going to report you to the Better Business Bureau! This is harassment! (Click)
